top_findings.title: POST /books persistence broken — books table never created (diesel migration mis-structured)
top_findings.evidence: migrations/00000000000001_diesel_initial_setup.up.sql is a FLAT file, not a migrations/<ver>_<name>/up.sql subdirectory; diesel 2.x embed_migrations! (src/db.rs:6) applies 0 migrations, so create_book (src/handlers.rs:59) inserts into a non-existent 'books' table at runtime. _agent_stdout.log:1 'the books table is not being created'; test_create_and_list_books (src/main.rs:94) fails; scores.json test_coverage=0.8 (4/5).
top_findings.suggestion: Move the migration into migrations/00000000000001_diesel_initial_setup/{up,down}.sql so embed_migrations! picks it up, or create the table explicitly before serving/tests.

top_findings.title: test_create_and_list_books fails (1 of 5 tests)
top_findings.evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.8 (rust pass-rate fallback = 4/5). Failing test src/main.rs:94 calls run_migrations() then create_book(); the create step hits a missing 'books' table because migrations apply nothing (see R1).
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the migration structure (R1); the test itself is correctly written and will pass once the table is created.
